cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. So the question is about Jane's birthday and figuring out a date one year ago from today. Let me break down the information given. First, Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. February usually has 28 days, but in a leap year, it has 29. Since 2001 isn't a leap year (leap years are divisible by 4, and 2000 was a leap year, then 2004, so 2001 isn't), so the last day of February 2001 would be February 28, 2001.
